creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
This patch updates sysutils/webmin to release 0.83.

Makefile:

  * Bumped PORTVERSION

distinfo:

  * New tarball

pkg-plist:

  * Added new files, and sorted the PLIST

Fix: PORTNAME=	webmin
-PORTVERSION=	0.82
+PORTVERSION=	0.83
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.webmin.com/webmin/download/
